ayahs.arabic: قُلْ أُوحِىَ إِلَىَّ أَنَّهُ ٱسْتَمَعَ نَفَرٌ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا قُرْءَانًا عَجَبًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul oohiya ilayya annahu istamaAAanafarun mina aljinni faqaloo inna samiAAnaqur-anan AAajaba
ayahs.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], "It has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened and said, 'Indeed, we have heard an amazing Qur’ān [i.e., recitation].

ayahs.arabic: يَهْدِىٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشْدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ وَلَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Yahdee ila arrushdi faamannabihi walan nushrika birabbina ahada
ayahs.translation: It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ تَعَـٰلَىٰ جَدُّ رَبِّنَا مَا ٱتَّخَذَ صَـٰحِبَةً وَلَا وَلَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waannahu taAAala jaddu rabbinama ittakhatha sahibatan wala walada
ayahs.translation: And [it teaches] that exalted is the nobleness of our Lord; He has not taken a wife or a son

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ شَطَطًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waannahu kana yaqoolu safeehunaAAala Allahi shatata
ayahs.translation: And that our foolish one [i.e., Iblees][1766] has been saying about Allāh an excessive transgression.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن تَقُولَ ٱلْإِنسُ وَٱلْجِنُّ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waanna thanannaan lan taqoola al-insu waljinnu AAala Allahikathiba
ayahs.translation: And we had thought that mankind and the jinn would never speak about Allāh a lie.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ رِجَالٌ مِّنَ ٱلْإِنسِ يَعُوذُونَ بِرِجَالٍ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَزَادُوهُمْ رَهَقًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waannahu kana rijalun minaal-insi yaAAoothoona birijalin mina aljinni fazadoohumrahaqa
ayahs.translation: And there were men from mankind who sought refuge in men from the jinn, so they [only] increased them in burden [i.e., sin].

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّهُمْ ظَنُّوا۟ كَمَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن لَّن يَبْعَثَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waannahum thannoo kama thanantuman lan yabAAatha Allahu ahada
ayahs.translation: And they had thought, as you thought, that Allāh would never send anyone [as a messenger].

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّا لَمَسْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ فَوَجَدْنَـٰهَا مُلِئَتْ حَرَسًا شَدِيدًا وَشُهُبًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waanna lamasna assamaafawajadnaha muli-at harasan shadeedanwashuhuba
ayahs.translation: And we have sought [to reach] the heaven but found it filled with powerful guards and burning flames.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقْعُدُ مِنْهَا مَقَـٰعِدَ لِلسَّمْعِ ۖ فَمَن يَسْتَمِعِ ٱلْـَٔانَ يَجِدْ لَهُۥ شِهَابًا رَّصَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waanna kunna naqAAudu minhamaqaAAida lissamAAi faman yastamiAAi al-anayajid lahu shihaban rasada
ayahs.translation: And we used to sit therein in positions for hearing,[1767] but whoever listens now will find a burning flame lying in wait for him.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدْرِىٓ أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ أَرَادَ بِهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ رَشَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waanna la nadree asharrunoreeda biman fee al-ardi am arada bihim rabbuhumrashada
ayahs.translation: And we do not know [therefore] whether evil is intended for those on earth or whether their Lord intends for them a right course.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلصَّـٰلِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ كُنَّا طَرَآئِقَ قِدَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waanna minna assalihoonawaminna doona thalika kunna tara-iqaqidada
ayahs.translation: And among us are the righteous, and among us are [others] not so; we were [of] divided ways.[1768]

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًا
ayahs.transliteration: Wanna thanannaan lan nuAAjiza Allaha fee al-ardi walan nuAAjizahuharaba
ayahs.translation: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allāh upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعْنَا ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ فَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِرَبِّهِۦ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًا وَلَا رَهَقًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waanna lamma samiAAnaalhuda amanna bihi faman yu/min birabbihifala yakhafu bakhsan wala rahaqa
ayahs.translation: And when we heard the guidance [i.e., the Qur’ān], we believed in it. And whoever believes in his Lord will not fear deprivation or burden.[1769]

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلْمُسْلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلْقَـٰسِطُونَ ۖ فَمَنْ أَسْلَمَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوْا۟ رَشَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waanna minna almuslimoonawaminna alqasitoona faman aslama faola-ikataharraw rashada
ayahs.translation: And among us are Muslims [in submission to Allāh], and among us are the unjust.[1770] And whoever has become Muslim - those have sought out the right course.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلْقَـٰسِطُونَ فَكَانُوا۟ لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waama alqasitoona fakanoolijahannama hataba
ayahs.translation: But as for the unjust, they will be, for Hell, firewood.'

ayahs.arabic: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسْتَقَـٰمُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسْقَيْنَـٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waallawi istaqamoo AAala attareeqatilaasqaynahum maan ghadaqa
ayahs.translation: And [Allāh revealed] that if they had remained straight on the way, We would have given them abundant rain [i.e., provision]

ayahs.arabic: لِّنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ ۚ وَمَن يُعْرِضْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِۦ يَسْلُكْهُ عَذَابًا صَعَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Linaftinahum feehi waman yuAArid AAanthikri rabbihi yasluk-hu AAathaban saAAada
ayahs.translation: So We might test them therein. And whoever turns away from the remembrance of his Lord[1771] He will put into arduous punishment.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّ ٱلْمَسَـٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waanna almasajida lillahi falatadAAoo maAAa Allahi ahada
ayahs.translation: And [He revealed] that the masjids[1772] are for Allāh, so do not invoke[1773] with Allāh anyone.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ يَدْعُوهُ كَادُوا۟ يَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِ لِبَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waannahu lamma qama AAabdu AllahiyadAAoohu kadoo yakoonoona AAalayhi libada
ayahs.translation: And that when the Servant [i.e., Prophet] of Allāh stood up supplicating Him, they almost became about him a compacted mass."[1774]

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى وَلَآ أُشْرِكُ بِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul innama adAAoo rabbee walaoshriku bihi ahada
ayahs.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], "I only invoke my Lord and do not associate with Him anyone."

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ إِنِّى لَآ أَمْلِكُ لَكُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا رَشَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul innee la amliku lakum darranwala rashada
ayahs.translation: Say, "Indeed, I do not possess for you [the power of] harm or right direction."

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ إِنِّى لَن يُجِيرَنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدٌ وَلَنْ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلْتَحَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul innee lan yujeeranee mina Allahiahadun walan ajida min doonihi multahada
ayahs.translation: Say, "Indeed, there will never protect me from Allāh anyone [if I should disobey], nor will I find in other than Him a refuge.

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا بَلَـٰغًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِسَـٰلَـٰتِهِۦ ۚ وَمَن يَعْصِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Illa balaghan mina Allahiwarisalatihi waman yaAAsi Allahawarasoolahu fa-inna lahu nara jahannama khalideenafeeha abada
ayahs.translation: But [I have for you] only notification from Allāh, and His messages." And whoever disobeys Allāh and His Messenger - then indeed, for him is the fire of Hell; they will abide therein forever.

ayahs.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوْا۟ مَا يُوعَدُونَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَضْعَفُ نَاصِرًا وَأَقَلُّ عَدَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Hatta itha raaw mayooAAadoona fasayaAAlamoona man adAAafu nasiranwaaqallu AAadada
ayahs.translation: [The disbelievers continue] until, when they see that which they are promised, then they will know who is weaker in helpers and less in number.

ayahs.arabic: قُلْ إِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمْ يَجْعَلُ لَهُۥ رَبِّىٓ أَمَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Qul in adree aqareebun ma tooAAadoonaam yajAAalu lahu rabbee amada
ayahs.translation: Say, "I do not know if what you are promised is near or if my Lord will grant for it a [long] period."

ayahs.arabic: عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَلَا يُظْهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيْبِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: AAalimu alghaybi fala yuthhiruAAala ghaybihi ahada
ayahs.translation: [He is] Knower of the unseen, and He does not disclose His [knowledge of the] unseen to anyone

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱرْتَضَىٰ مِن رَّسُولٍ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَسْلُكُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِۦ رَصَدًا
ayahs.transliteration: Illa mani irtada min rasoolinfa-innahu yasluku min bayni yadayhi wamin khalfihi rasada
ayahs.translation: Except whom He has approved of messengers, and indeed, He sends before him [i.e., each messenger] and behind him observers[1775]

ayahs.arabic: لِّيَعْلَمَ أَن قَدْ أَبْلَغُوا۟ رِسَـٰلَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ وَأَحْصَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عَدَدًۢا
ayahs.transliteration: LiyaAAlama an qad ablaghoo risalatirabbihim waahata bima ladayhim waahsa kullashay-in AAadada
ayahs.translation: That he [i.e., Muḥammad (ﷺ)] may know[1776] that they have conveyed the messages of their Lord; and He has encompassed whatever is with them and has enumerated all things in number.
